channel.title: FierceBiotech — Health, Longevity & Diet
channel.description: FierceBiotech articles filtered for longevity, health, diet, and healthspan research

item.title: Australia’s Kazia pays research institute $1.4M for epigenetic platform, preclinical drug
item.description: Kazia Therapeutics is paying $1.4 million upfront to secure a platform for generating epigenetic drugs from an Australian research institute.

item.title: Harbinger Health raises $100M for new suite of blood-based cancer detection tests
item.description: Harbinger Health has grabbed $100 million in its latest funding round as the company reveals a new Resolve in its cancer detection work.

item.title: Kailera outlines plans for $528.5M IPO to support quartet of Chinese obesity assets
item.description: Kailera is taking another step into the competitive obesity market by aiming to raise up to $528.5 million via a Nasdaq IPO, with proceeds intended to advance its GLP-1 assets through clinical development.

item.title: Biotech Giants and Investors Gather to Solve the Commercialisation Puzzle This May in Hong Kong
item.description: Join global leaders at ASGH 2026 to bridge the gap between lab breakthroughs and market execution while unlocking growth in Asia’s health economy.

item.title: Regeneron rides into radiopharma via $2.1B biobucks pact with Australia’s Telix
item.description: With its latest obesity play appearing to pay off, Regeneron has turned its attention to radiopharmaceuticals.
